Email Demo: Klaviyo Tech Setup + 5 Things You Probably Didn't Know

EMAIL DEMO: KLAVIYO TECH SETUP + 5 THINGS YOU
PROBABLY DIDN’T KNOW
Topic Progress:
In this lesson, I'll teach you how to set up your Klaviyo account for scaling your online
store. I'm using Klaviyo to teach just because it's the tool I use for all 24 of my
ecommerce clients. However, feel free to set up an account with any other email service
provider. The principles taught in my module will remain the same.
ACTION ITEM
Set up your account with Klaviyo or any other email service provider you'd like.
Get ready to blow up your online store using email marketing!
